name: Facebook
description: Access Facebook Graph API to manage pages, posts, and insights.
author: OpenJiuwen
desc_mk:
## Facebook Graph API

Manage Facebook pages, posts, and access analytics through the Facebook Graph API.

**Note:** Get your access token at [Meta for Developers](https://developers.facebook.com/apps/).

Authorization.description: Facebook access token for authentication (Environment variable: FACEBOOK_ACCESS_TOKEN)

tools.name: Get User Profile
tools.description: Get the current user's Facebook profile information.

fields.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return (e.g. id,name,email,picture)

tools.name: Get Page Info
tools.description: Get information about a specific Facebook page.

page_id.description: The ID or username of the Facebook page

fields.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return (e.g. id,name,about,fan_count,category)

tools.name: Get Page Posts
tools.description: Get the posts on a Facebook page's feed.

page_id.description: The ID or username of the Facebook page

fields.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return (e.g. id,message,story,created_time,likes,comments)

limit.description: Maximum number of posts to return

tools.name: Create Page Post
tools.description: Create a new post on a Facebook page.

page_id.description: The ID of the Facebook page to post to

message.description: The text content of the post

link.description: URL to attach to the post

published.description: Whether to publish immediately (true) or save as draft (false)

scheduled_publish_time.description: Unix timestamp for scheduled publish time (requires published=false)

tools.name: Get Post Insights
tools.description: Get insights and metrics for a specific Facebook post.

post_id.description: The ID of the Facebook post

tools.name: Get Page Insights
tools.description: Get insights and analytics for a Facebook page.

page_id.description: The ID of the Facebook page

period.description: Time period: day, week, days_28, month, lifetime

since.description: Start of date range as Unix timestamp or date string

until.description: End of date range as Unix timestamp or date string

tools.name: Search Pages
tools.description: Search for Facebook pages by name or keyword.

type.description: The type of object to search for (e.g. page, place, event)

fields.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return
